chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S-316 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on MA 2413/2024 2.For orders on MA 2414/2024 3.For orders on MA 2415/2024 4.For hearing of Bail Application 20-05-2024 Mr. Arif Ali Abbasi, Advocate along with applicant. ****** 1. Urgency is granted. 2-4. Applicant was granted protective bail in Crime No.01 of 2024, registered at P.S, ACE, Khairpur, for offences under Sections 161 & 342 PPC r/w section 5 PCA-II of 1947 for six days vide order dated 13.05.2024 against surety of Rs.50,000/- in Crl.B.A.No.S-297 of 2024. He has again filed this application for the same relief without even disclosing the fact that he had earlier filed application for the same purpose, which was entertained and he was granted protective bail for six days. It has not been disclosed by learned counsel either as to why applicant did not execute surety in terms of earlier order passed in earlier bail application and why despite that he has not been arrested by the police, as alleged by him in this application to be the sole ground seeking protective bail on. No ground, therefore, entertaining fresh application on the same ground is made out and accordingly this bail application is dismissed along with listed applications. JUDGE Ahmad
